mission_title: Short Story Polisher 1.1 — Substantive Polish and Original Deduplication Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
actual=hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
expected='cd10a9874a9f0c50dc14968f46c7d05867c72ffa51192b045e2d34b2e577dec6'
assert actual==expected, f'installed hash mismatch: {actual}'
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_EXACT_HASH_OK')
validations.name: Verify exact installed payload SHA-256

argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
compile(s,str(p),'exec')
required=(
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_BACKEND_END',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_STORAGE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_STORAGE_END',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_1_JS_END',
    'story_change_metrics',
    'story_change_is_substantive',
    '_short_story_find_identical_saved',
    'content_sha256:',
    'reused canonical original',
    'No polished version was accepted or made saveable',
)
missing=[item for item in required if item not in s]
assert not missing, 'missing 1.1 repair markers: '+', '.join(missing)
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_PYTHON_AND_MARKERS_OK')
validations.name: Verify Python syntax and Short Story Polisher 1.1 markers

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, os, re, shutil, subprocess, sys, tempfile
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
html_value=None
for item in tree.body:
    if isinstance(item,(ast.Assign,ast.AnnAssign)):
        targets=item.targets if isinstance(item,ast.Assign) else [item.target]
        if any(isinstance(t,ast.Name) and t.id=='HTML' for t in targets):
            html_value=ast.literal_eval(item.value)
            break
assert isinstance(html_value,str), 'HTML constant not found'
blocks=re.findall(r'<script(?:\s[^>]*)?>(.*?)</script>',html_value,flags=re.I|re.S)
assert blocks, 'No embedded JavaScript blocks found'
node=shutil.which('node') or shutil.which('node.exe')
if not node:
    candidate=Path(os.environ.get('ProgramFiles',r'C:\Program Files'))/'nodejs'/'node.exe'
    if candidate.is_file():
        node=str(candidate)
assert node, 'Node.js was not found for embedded JavaScript verification'
temp_path=None
try:
    with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile('w',suffix='.js',encoding='utf-8',delete=False) as handle:
        handle.write('\n;\n'.join(blocks))
        temp_path=handle.name
    result=subprocess.run([str(node),'--check',temp_path],capture_output=True,text=True,shell=False)
    if result.stdout:
        print(result.stdout)
    if result.stderr:
        print(result.stderr,file=sys.stderr)
    assert result.returncode==0, f'Node syntax check failed with return code {result.returncode}'
finally:
    if temp_path:
        try:
            Path(temp_path).unlink()
        except FileNotFoundError:
            pass
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_EMBEDDED_JAVASCRIPT_OK')
validations.name: Verify embedded interface JavaScript syntax with Node

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast, re
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
node=next(n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name=='kayock_writer_poetry_polish')
ns={
    're':re,
    '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
    '_writer_voice_profile_id':lambda value:'',
    'build_writer_voice_prompt':lambda *args:'',
    '_writer_voice_profile_name':lambda value:'',
    'get_writer_voice_profile':lambda value:{},
}
exec(compile(ast.Module(body=[node],type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
original=(
    'The programmer watched the city from a narrow window. '
    'He built the machine to restore balance. '
    'He feared what it might become, but he pressed the final key anyway.'
)
responses=iter([
    {'ok':True,'poem':original},
    {'ok':True,'poem':(
        'The programmer watched the sleepless city through a narrow window. '
        'He built the machine to restore a measure of balance. '
        'Though he feared what it might become, he pressed the final key anyway.'
    )},
])
calls=[]
def chat(*args,**kwargs):
    calls.append(1)
    return next(responses)
ns['_poetry_chat']=chat
result=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_polish']({
    'writing_type':'short_story',
    'poem':original,
    'focus':'Balanced story polish',
    'voice':'My natural voice',
})
assert result.get('ok')
assert result.get('polish_attempts')==2
assert result.get('substantive_change') is True
assert result.get('identical_output_rejected') is True
assert int((result.get('change_metrics') or {}).get('changed_words') or 0)>=3
assert len(calls)==2
responses=iter([
    {'ok':True,'poem':original},
    {'ok':True,'poem':original},
])
calls.clear()
ns['_poetry_chat']=chat
result=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_polish']({
    'writing_type':'short_story',
    'poem':original,
    'focus':'Deep polish — preserve story',
    'voice':'My natural voice',
})
assert not result.get('ok')
assert result.get('unchanged_output') is True
assert result.get('polish_attempts')==2
assert result.get('story_facts_protected') is True
assert result.get('story_forge_used') is False
assert len(calls)==2
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_SUBSTANTIVE_RETRY_AND_REJECTION_OK')
validations.name: Verify substantive-polish retry and unchanged-output rejection

argv:
from pathlib import Path
from datetime import datetime
import ast, hashlib, json, re, tempfile
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
source=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
tree=ast.parse(source)
wanted={
    '_short_story_saved_body',
    '_short_story_saved_meta',
    '_short_story_find_identical_saved',
    'kayock_writer_poetry_save',
}
nodes=[n for n in tree.body if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in wanted]
assert {n.name for n in nodes}==wanted
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temp_dir:
    root=Path(temp_dir)
    folder=root/'Drafts'
    ns={
        'hashlib':hashlib,
        'json':json,
        're':re,
        'Path':Path,
        'datetime':datetime,
        'ROOT':root,
        'FOLDERS':{'kayock_writer_short_story_drafts':folder},
        'chat_model':None,
        '_writer_text':lambda value,limit: str(value or '')[:limit],
        '_writer_voice_profile_id':lambda value:'',
        'now':lambda:'2026-07-21T00:00:00',
    }
    exec(compile(ast.Module(body=nodes,type_ignores=[]),str(p),'exec'),ns)
    base={
        'writing_type':'short_story',
        'title':'Validation Story',
        'source_mode':'polisher',
        'settings':{
            'writing_type':'short_story',
            'author':'Eric Z. Fox',
            'copyright':'Copyright © 2026 by Eric Z. Fox',
        },
    }
    original_1=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_save']({
        **base,
        'poem':'Canonical original body.',
        'version_kind':'original',
        'version_group':'group-one',
    })
    original_2=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_save']({
        **base,
        'poem':'Canonical original body.',
        'version_kind':'original',
        'version_group':'group-two',
    })
    polished_1=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_save']({
        **base,
        'poem':'Polished body with clearer movement.',
        'version_kind':'polished',
        'version_group':original_2.get('version_group'),
    })
    polished_2=ns['kayock_writer_poetry_save']({
        **base,
        'poem':'Polished body with clearer movement.',
        'version_kind':'polished',
        'version_group':'group-three',
    })
    assert original_1.get('new_file') is True
    assert original_2.get('reused_existing') is True
    assert original_2.get('version_group')=='group-one'
    assert polished_1.get('new_file') is True
    assert polished_2.get('reused_existing') is True
    files=list(folder.glob('*.md'))
    assert len(files)==2, f'expected two files, found {len(files)}'
    assert all('content_sha256:' in item.read_text(encoding='utf-8') for item in files)
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_CANONICAL_ORIGINAL_AND_REVISION_DEDUP_OK')
validations.name: Verify canonical-original and polished-revision deduplication

argv:
from pathlib import Path
p=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py')
s=p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
required=(
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_HTML_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_CREATOR_TYPE_1_2_STORAGE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_PROFILE_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_HTML_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_JS_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_BACKEND_START',
    'FOXAI_SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_V1_STORAGE_START',
    'ERIC_SHORT_FICTION_PROFILE',
    'ERIC_POET_NARRATOR_PROFILE_V1_START',
    'Eric — Short Fiction',
    'Eric — Poet/Narrator',
    'Robin Hood — The Merry Outlaw',
    'Zorro — The Masked Fox',
    'Dracula — The Ancient Count',
    'Sherlock Holmes — The Consulting Mind',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_create',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_polish',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_revise_selection',
    'def kayock_writer_poetry_archive',
    'KAYOCK_WRITER_CALM_GUIDED_V2_BROWSER_START',
    'KAYOCKS_STUDY_INTEGRATION_V1_HELPERS_START',
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_drafts']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_recordings']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_poetry_legacy']",
    "FOLDERS['kayock_writer_short_story_drafts']",
    "go('storyforge')",
    '/api/writer/poetry/create',
    '/api/writer/poetry/polish',
    '/api/writer/poetry/save',
)
missing=[item for item in required if item not in s]
assert not missing, 'protected feature anchors missing: '+', '.join(missing)
assert "writing_type='poem'" in s
assert "writing_type=='short_story'" in s
assert 'Short Story Creator' in s
assert 'Short Story Polisher' in s
print('SHORT_STORY_POLISHER_1_1_PROTECTED_FEATURES_OK')
validations.name: Verify Poetry Studio, Story Forge, Writer, Study, archives, and voice profiles remain present
